subcodes.first_line: O friends of the Divine Lord! In this Most Great Cycle, when the Ancient Sun hath risen and shone forth from the horizons of all peoples [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوستان حضرت یزدان در این کور اعظم که شمس قدم از آفاق امم طالع و لائح گردید
subcodes.subjects: @apocalyptic imagery, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @call to action, @divine attributes are within all things; every atom, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @service to others; to the Cause of God
